module_title: Drishvara Source Doctrine & Sanskrit Integrity Framework

method_notes: Tithi-based observances must be treated as interval-based and sunrise-sensitive where applicable.
Festival and vrat decisions must be separated from raw astronomical calculation.
Regional variation and contested observance dates must be represented explicitly.
Future calculation modules must declare location, timezone, sunrise basis, and rule family.

reference_background.title: Development of Pancanga from vedic times upto the present
reference_background.author: Shakti Dhara Sharma
reference_background.usage: Historical and methodological background for Panchang evolution, astronomical observation, Siddhanta-period development, lunar/solar corrections, and tithi/festival controversies.

source_hierarchy.name: primary_textual_or_astronomical_source
source_hierarchy.description: Original Sanskrit source, established Jyotisha/Panchang calculation text, recognized astronomical basis, or canonical mantra source.

source_hierarchy.name: commentary_or_traditional_interpretive_source
source_hierarchy.description: Traditional commentary, regional Panchang authority, sampradaya-specific rule, or temple/tradition-specific practice note.

source_hierarchy.name: modern_scholarly_or_technical_source
source_hierarchy.description: Academic paper, astronomy/calendrical history paper, technical calculation note, or institutionally credible reference.

source_hierarchy.name: editorial_curation
source_hierarchy.description: Drishvara explanation, simplified public-facing note, subscriber-friendly interpretation, or non-authoritative reflection note.

rules: Do not present pseudo-Sanskrit as Sanskrit.
Do not mix translation and Sanskrit as if both are source text.
Do not use unverifiable bija-mantra combinations.
Do not claim Vedic, Puranic, or Tantric source without reference.
Preserve Devanagari and IAST separately wherever Sanskrit text is used.

privacy_and_entitlement.entitlement_principle: Premium gating must be handled at service layer and must not leak private subscriber data.

inspiration_disclaimer.permitted: Drishvara follows a source-first and Sanskrit-integrity approach inspired by public scholarly discipline around correct Sanskrit, textual awareness, and responsible interpretation.
